description: Draws a tick mark annotation between two endpoints. Creates a small perpendicular mark to indicate correctness or completion with optional styling.
utility: Mark correct answers or completed items with tick symbols

arguments.name: from
arguments.description: Starting point for the tick mark, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: to
arguments.description: Ending point for the tick mark, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: style
arguments.description: Optional styling modifiers (c for color, s() for style, dash, fadeout, etc.)
